menu_browse_desc: Open the shop and buy weapons & ammo
menu_buy_store_desc: Become the owner of this gun store
menu_buy_store_confirm: Are you sure you want to buy %s for %s?
menu_manage_desc: Stock, prices, name, blip and earnings
menu_admin_edit_desc: Edit settings, owner or delete this store
manage_stock_desc: Add, restock, reprice or remove items
manage_edit_info_desc: Rename the store and change its blip
manage_withdraw_desc: Withdraw money the store has earned
manage_sell_desc: Give up ownership for a partial refund
manage_sell_confirm: Sell %s back to the system for %s? You will lose ownership.
manage_add_item_desc: List a weapon or ammo from your inventory
no_sellable_items: You have no weapons or ammo in your inventory to list
manual_add_desc: Type an item name (admin / system stock)
admin_create_desc: Place a new gun store at your position
admin_delete_confirm: Permanently delete %s? This cannot be undone.
admin_stock_prices_desc: Set the wholesale cost owners pay to restock from the system
input_server_id_desc: The in-game ID of the player to give ownership to
input_ped_model_desc: Spawn an NPC as the store target. Leave blank for a point. Model names: docs.fivem.net/docs/game-references/ped-models
input_stock_price_desc: What an owner pays to restock one of this item from the system
store_sold_back: Store sold back to the system. You received $%s.
store_not_for_sale: This store is not for sale
stock_full: This item is already at maximum stock
not_enough_items: You need %s in your inventory but only have %s
no_permission: You don't have permission to do that
not_enough_balance: The store doesn't have that much money
item_not_allowed: That item can't be sold here
